full_description: BookBuddy is a book tracking app designed to help you discover new books, track your reading progress, and connect with other readers. With BookBuddy, you can easily log and track the books you've read, are currently reading, and want to read. The app allows you to create a virtual bookshelf, set reading goals, and join discussions with fellow book lovers. Share your favorite books and get recommendations from others in the community. Whether you're a casual reader or an avid bookworm, BookBuddy provides a simple and social way to share your love of reading with others.
